title: WebSockets
excerpt: description: Miniflare will always upgrade Web Socket connections. The Worker must respond with a status 101 Switching Protocols response including a webSocket. For example, the Worker below implements an echo WebSocket server: image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further.
